description: The PlaybackPositionDriver component is used to output and/or influence the playback position of an IPlayable.

fields.Target: The field to drive with the time position of ``Source`` from. If ``UseNormalizedPosition`` is true, this is 01, else it's the amount of seconds from the start.
fields.Source: The playable audio to get the time from.
fields.UseNormalizedPosition: Whether to output a 01 or an amount of seconds
fields.WriteBack: Whether writing to the value of the field specified by ``Target`` will set the playback position. See write backs.

usage: Can be used on a timeline to get the amount of time left or played in an audio clip that is playing.
